audit_status.source_base: Hebrew Leviticus / Vayiqra holiness-social ethics text tradition, draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: First-pass draft reviewed for holiness, parents/Sabbath, offerings, gleaning, neighbor justice, wages, disability justice, impartial courts, love neighbor, mixtures, sexual exploitation of enslaved woman, fruit trees, occult prohibitions, age respect, sojourner love, honest measures.

verses.restored: YHWH spoke to Moses, saying,
Speak to all congregation of children of Israel and say to them: Holy you shall be, for I, YHWH your Divine, am holy.
Each one shall revere mother and father, and my Sabbaths you shall keep. I am YHWH your Divine.
Do not turn to idols, and molten gods you shall not make for yourselves. I am YHWH your Divine.
When you sacrifice sacrifice of peace/well-being to YHWH, you shall sacrifice it for your acceptance.
On day of your sacrificing it shall be eaten and on next day; what remains until third day shall be burned in fire.
If eating, it is eaten on third day, it is offensive; it shall not be accepted.
The one eating it shall bear iniquity, because holy thing of YHWH he profaned; that soul/life shall be cut off from its people.
When you reap harvest of your land, you shall not reap to edge of your field, and gleaning of your harvest you shall not gather.
Your vineyard you shall not strip, and fallen grapes of your vineyard you shall not gather; for poor and for sojourner you shall leave them. I am YHWH your Divine.
You shall not steal, and you shall not deceive, and you shall not lie, each to one's companion.
You shall not swear by my name falsely and profane name of your Divine. I am YHWH.
You shall not oppress your companion and shall not rob; wages of hired worker shall not remain with you until morning.
You shall not curse deaf one, and before blind one you shall not put stumbling block; you shall fear your Divine. I am YHWH.
You shall do no injustice in judgment; you shall not lift face of poor one and shall not honor face of great one; in righteousness/justice you shall judge your companion.
You shall not go about as slanderer among your people; you shall not stand upon blood/life of your companion. I am YHWH.
You shall not hate your brother in your heart; rebuking, you shall rebuke your companion, and not bear sin/misalignment because of him.
You shall not take vengeance and shall not keep grudge against sons of your people; you shall love your neighbor/companion as yourself. I am YHWH.
My statutes you shall keep. Your beast you shall not breed mixed kinds; your field you shall not sow mixed seed; garment of mixed kinds, mixed material, shall not come upon you.

When a man lies sexually with a woman, emission of seed, and she is a slave-woman designated to a man but not redeemed nor freedom given to her, investigation/compensation shall occur; they shall not be put to death, because she was not free.
He shall bring his guilt/reparation offering to YHWH, to entrance of tent of meeting, ram of guilt/reparation offering.
Priest shall make atonement/covering for him with ram of guilt/reparation before YHWH for his sin/misalignment that he sinned, and it shall be forgiven him from his sin/misalignment that he sinned.
When you come into land and plant any tree for food, you shall regard its fruit as foreskin/uncircumcised; three years it shall be uncircumcised to you, not eaten.
In fourth year all its fruit shall be holy, praise-offering to YHWH.
In fifth year you may eat its fruit, so it may add its produce to you. I am YHWH your Divine.
You shall not eat upon blood/life. You shall not practice divination, nor interpret omens.
You shall not round off edge of your head, and you shall not destroy edge of your beard.
Cuttings for the dead you shall not put in your flesh, and tattoo/mark writing you shall not put on yourselves. I am YHWH.
Do not profane your daughter by making her a prostitute, lest land prostitute itself and land be filled with wickedness.
My Sabbaths you shall keep, and my sanctuary you shall revere. I am YHWH.
Do not turn to ghosts/mediums, and to familiar spirits do not seek, becoming unclean by them. I am YHWH your Divine.
Before gray hair you shall rise, and honor face of old one; you shall fear your Divine. I am YHWH.
When sojourner sojourns with you in your land, you shall not wrong him.
As native among you shall sojourner be to you, the one sojourning with you; you shall love him as yourself, for you were sojourners in land of Egypt. I am YHWH your Divine.
You shall do no injustice in judgment, in measure, weight, or quantity.
Just balances, just weights, just ephah, and just hin you shall have. I am YHWH your Divine, who brought you out from land of Egypt.
You shall keep all my statutes and all my judgments, and do them. I am YHWH.

translation_notes: Leviticus 19 is a central holiness/social ethics chapter: holiness includes field margins, wages, disability justice, truthful speech, courts, elders, sojourners, and honest measures.
Love your neighbor/companion as yourself in v.18 and love the sojourner as yourself in v.34 must be held together.
Verse 20 involves an enslaved/unfree woman and requires sexual-exploitation and consent audit; do not normalize enslavement or coercive sex.
Do not curse the deaf or put stumbling block before blind person is disability justice, not metaphor only.
Honest weights are grounded in Exodus liberation memory.
safety_note: Leviticus 19 must not be reduced to ritual oddities. It is one of the strongest justice chapters in Torah: leave food for poor and sojourner, pay wages promptly, protect disabled people, refuse slander, love neighbor and sojourner, and use honest measures.
